name: search_tenders
description: Call when your agent needs to find government contract opportunities. Searches UK Contracts Finder, EU TED, and US SAM.gov simultaneously. Returns AI-scored tenders with fit_score (0-100), BID/INVESTIGATE/SKIP recommendation, deadline, estimated value, and key requirements per result.

arguments.name: keyword
arguments.description: Search keyword: company capability, product type, or service (e.g. cybersecurity, catering, IT support)

arguments.name: company_profile
arguments.description: Description of company capabilities for AI fit scoring. More detail produces better scores. Omit for unscored results.

arguments.name: sources
arguments.description: Which sources to search: uk, eu, us. Defaults to all three.

arguments.name: limit
arguments.description: Max results per source. Default 10, max 25.

arguments.name: days_old
arguments.description: Only return tenders published in the last N days. Default 30.

arguments.name: min_score
arguments.description: Only return tenders scoring above this threshold. Default 50. Applies only when company_profile is provided.

name: get_tender_intelligence
description: DAILY_DIGEST mode: returns all new tenders posted in the last 24 hours matching your keywords from UK, EU, and US markets. AWARD_HISTORY mode: returns past contract winners to identify incumbents before bidding. Use on a daily schedule to never miss an opportunity.

arguments.name: mode
arguments.description: DAILY_DIGEST for new tenders in last 24hrs; AWARD_HISTORY for past contract winners

arguments.name: keywords
arguments.description: Keywords to monitor or search. Required for DAILY_DIGEST.

arguments.name: keyword
arguments.description: Keyword for award history search. Required for AWARD_HISTORY.

arguments.name: sources
arguments.description: Sources to search: uk, eu, us. Defaults to all three.

arguments.name: limit
arguments.description: Max results per source for AWARD_HISTORY. Default 10.
